title: How to watch Australia vs Italy: FREE streams, TV channels for Nations Championship 2026 game
summary: Australia vs Italy is free-to-air on Virgin Media One in Ireland, with live streaming available via the Virgin Media Play platform. In Australia, Wallabies vs Italy is free-to-air on Channel 9, with live streaming available via 9Now .
